definitions: To suddenly experience or understand the harsh truth of a situation.
To be confronted with the true, often unpleasant, state of affairs.
examples: After losing his job, he was hit with reality about his financial situation.
The young entrepreneur was hit with reality when his startup failed.
She was hit with reality about the challenges of living abroad.
